name: impulsemc-website
description: Static marketing website for ImpulseMacro Innovation Private Limited

scripts.build:css: cleancss -O2 -o css/style.min.css css/style.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/animations.min.css css/animations.css
scripts.build:js: terser js/utils.js -c -m -o js/utils.min.js && terser js/animations.js -c -m -o js/animations.min.js && terser js/main.js -c -m -o js/main.min.js
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
